incident_summary: Visible particulate found in 64 vials during 100% visual inspection of batch A7911C (7733 total vials). Particles identified as glass lamellae from vial inner surface.
root_cause_detail: Glass vial supplier had process change — new vial mould introduced without notifying pharmaceutical customer. New mould produced higher rate of glass delamination under washing/sterilisation conditions.
corrective_action: Batch rejected and destroyed. All vials from same supplier lot quarantined. Supplier formally notified. Emergency supply sourced from qualified alternative supplier for ongoing production.
preventive_action: Supplier change notification clause added to vial supplier quality agreement — any process change requires prior notification and sample submission for qualification. Incoming vial delamination test introduced.
effectiveness_check: Zero glass particulate events for 12 months. Annual vial supplier audit to verify change notification process.
